hero.body: Pick a framework. Configure. Launch in 60 seconds. No code required, no infrastructure to manage. 4 frameworks, 20+ platforms, free tier with BYOK.

agentDiscovery.heading: Command an army of subagents
agentDiscovery.body: Your local coding agent becomes a fleet commander. Paste this prompt — it registers on Hatcher in your name, spins up always-on subagents (Telegram bots, research loops, Discord mods, monitors), and keeps controlling them long after your session ends.
agentDiscovery.step01: Send this prompt to your AI coding agent — Claude Code, Cursor, OpenClaw, Hermes, or any agent that can fetch URLs and run shell commands.
agentDiscovery.step02: Agent registers an account with your email and sends you a verification link.
agentDiscovery.step03: Click verify. Your agent picks a template, deploys, and hands you a running AI.

howItWorks.heading: 3 steps. 60 seconds.
howItWorks.subheading: No coding, no setup guides, no configuration files.

steps.title: Pick a framework
steps.desc: OpenClaw, Hermes, ElizaOS, or Milady. Each has unique strengths — browser control, memory, multi-agent, on-chain.

steps.title: Configure
steps.desc: Name, personality, integrations. Fill a simple form — no config files, no YAML.

steps.title: Deploy
steps.desc: One click. Your agent is live on every connected platform in under 60 seconds.

compareTable.heading: Compare Plans
compareTable.subheading: See what each tier includes at a glance

items.q: What is BYOK (Bring Your Own Key)?
items.a: BYOK lets you use your own API key for any LLM provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, Groq, OpenRouter). This is always free on all tiers -- you pay the provider directly, no Hatcher markup. Messages with your own key are unlimited.
Add-ons are stackable on any tier. For example, if you are on the Starter tier (1 agent) and purchase a +3 Agents add-on, you can run 4 agents total. You can stack multiple add-ons.

items.q: What is the difference between shared and dedicated resources?
items.a: Shared resources mean your agent shares CPU and RAM with others on the same server -- still performant but may vary under load. Dedicated resources (Pro and Business) give your agent guaranteed CPU and RAM that no one else can use.
You can pay with SOL or $HATCHER. Prices are listed in USD and converted at live rates via Jupiter.
Yes. You can cancel your subscription at any time and your tier will revert to Free at the end of the billing period. Agents beyond your free limit will be paused.

Free agents sleep after 1 hour of inactivity, Starter after 4 hours, Pro after 12 hours. Business and Founding Member agents are always-on with no auto-sleep. They wake instantly on the next message. You can add Always On to any agent for $7.99/mo.

items.q: What LLM do I get with the free tier?
items.a: Free and Starter tiers use GPT-OSS 20B on Groq. Pro, Business, and Founding Member tiers get Llama 3.3 70B on Groq — a more capable model. Message limits are account-wide: Free 20/day, Starter 50/day, Pro 100/day, Business 300/day, Founding 300/day. BYOK (bring your own LLM key) bypasses all limits on any tier.

items.q: What is the Founding Member tier?
items.a: Founding Member is a one-time $99 payment that gives you lifetime access to Hatcher: 10 agents, 300 messages/day, 4 GB RAM, 2 GB workspace, always-on, and all premium features (File Manager, Full Logs, priority support) included. No monthly fees, ever. Limited to 20 spots — once they are gone, this tier is gone.

cta.heading: Ready to deploy your agent?
cta.body: Pick your framework, choose a template, and deploy in seconds. Start free with a built-in LLM. Upgrade when you need more power.

pricing.footerNote: All prices in USD, payable in SOL or $HATCHER. BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) = unlimited messages with your own LLM API key on any tier.
